textByHash.cc6bb32116405814114a2aec7d6ea31935b77b26: I've received orders to let you through if you want. Good luck.
textByHash.f8b30a093d03af3845e8c3a2133f8284d65c8012: Be careful in there, there are still some of those baby Tanglefootii around.
textByHash.ea236745ab0bfadd99fe28ef679abab9debae20f: I'm afraid nobody is allowed in there, orders from the boss.
